[[File:SkywalkerAlbum_Pl.jpg|thumb|150px|Polish - ''Album rodzinny Skywalkerów'']]
'''''The Skywalker Family Album''''' is an album that was created to introduce the prominent [[Skywalker family/Legends|Skywalker family]], as well as a number of others related to them. It was released in [[April]] [[2002]], under the publication of [[Random House]]. The album was adapted by author [[Alice Alfonsi]] from [[Marni Taradash]]'s original article ''The Skywalker Family Album'' on www.starwarskids.com.

==Publisher's summary==
''The Skywalkers are one of the most important families in the galaxy.''

''Open this book to learn all about them.''
